name: NeuroKit
title: NeuroKit2: The Python Toolbox for Neurophysiological Signal Processing
description: NeuroKit2 is an open-source Python toolbox designed for the comprehensive processing and analysis of neurophysiological signals (ECG, EEG, EDA, EMG, PPG). This distribution is part of a reproducibility initiative.

contributors.title: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
